center.name: Henry Haversham Godwin-Austen
center.summary: Henry Haversham Godwin-Austen是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑眉鸦雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Suthora | species = atrosuperciliaris | authority = (Godwin-Austen, 1877) | synonyms = Paradoxornis atrosuperciliaris Chleuasicus atrosuperciliaris }} thumb|left| Illustration of the pale-billed parrotbill The pale-billed parrotbill (Suthora atrosuperciliaris) is a small and round bird with a short tail that was first found in China, where it still resides in evergreen forests or in habitats with bamboo
